subject: [PATCH v5 19/36] proc: include N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes in numa_maps output

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the numa_maps output in Linux to include private nodes that are not part of the N_MEMORY state. This is achieved by adding a check for N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes in the page-table walkers and modifying the show_numa_map function to print these nodes. The goal is to make private-node mappings visible in numa_maps, which was previously not possible due to filtering based on N_MEMORY.
